mapper.select: SELECT G.ID, G.COMP_CD, G.SEG_CD, G.SEG_NM, G.DESCRIPTION, G.DEFAULT_SHEET_CD, S.SHEET_NM AS DEFAULT_SHEET_NM, G.SORT_NO, G.USE_YN, G.REG_ID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VD_VENDOR V WHERE V.SEG_CD=G.SEG_CD AND V.DEL_YN='N') AS VENDOR_CNT FROM VD_SEGMENT G LEFT JOIN VD_EVAL_SHEET S ON S.SHEET_CD=G.DEFAULT_SHEET_CD AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE G.DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY G.SORT_NO, G.SEG_CD
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, SEG_CD, SEG_NM, DESCRIPTION, DEFAULT_SHEET_CD, SORT_NO, USE_YN, REG_ID FROM VD_SEGMENT WHERE SEG_CD=#{segCd} AND DEL_YN='N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VD_SEGMENT WHERE SEG_CD=#{segCd} AND DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_SEGMENT (COMP_CD, SEG_CD, SEG_NM, DESCRIPTION, DEFAULT_SHEET_CD, SORT_NO, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{segCd}, #{segNm}, #{description}, #{defaultSheetCd}, NVL(#{sortNo},1), NVL(#{useYn},'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE VD_SEGMENT SET SEG_NM=#{segNm}, DESCRIPTION=#{description}, DEFAULT_SHEET_CD=#{defaultSheetCd}, SORT_NO=NVL(#{sortNo},1), USE_YN=#{useYn}, MOD_ID=#{regId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_SEGMENT SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_VENDOR SET SEG_CD=#{segCd}, SEG_NM=#{segNm}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{vendorId}
